tasks.subject: Task 0: The modal factory (public/js/ui/modal.js)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure, app-agnostic `createPromptModal(config) -> {overlay, close}` emitting modal-system markup + the --prompt modifier; owns backdrop/Enter/focus-timing/invalid-cue/lifecycle. **Files:** - Create: public/js/ui/modal.js - Modify: public/js/ui.js (barrel) - Test: client-tests/modal-factory.test.js **Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/modal-factory.test.js` pass; then `npx jest` full suite green (additive, no existing test edited). **Steps:** TDD — write modal-factory.test.js (structure, overlayClass additive, title --solo, field flags, --stacked, onSubmit+invalid cue, close, closeOnBackdrop gate, Enter focus-advance, focusDelayMs 0/100 + focusIndex, XSS) → verify fail → implement modal.js (textContent-only, no app/socket imports, WHY comments) → add barrel export → verify pass → full suite → verify branch == phase7-3-design-system-hardening → commit. ```json:metadata {"files": ["public/js/ui/modal.js", "public/js/ui.js", "client-tests/modal-factory.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/modal-factory.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["createPromptModal builds .modal-overlay.modal-overlay--prompt > .modal-card.modal-card--prompt appended to body", "overlayClass additive", "title --solo iff no subtitle; subtitle

only when provided", "field label only when set; --gap-lg iff gap 1.5rem; --upper iff uppercase", "primary --stacked iff secondary; custom classNames added", "onSubmit(values,{invalid,close}); invalid(idx) sets borderColor #f87171 + focus + stays open", "Enter advances focus then submits on last field", "closeOnBackdrop gate (e.target===overlay)", "focusDelayMs 0 sync / >0 deferred; focusIndex selects", "textContent-only XSS-safe", "returns {overlay,close}; barrel re-exports modal.js", "WHY comments on every change"]} ```

tasks.subject: Task 1: Per-prompt config builders (public/js/ui/name-prompts.js)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Three pure deps-injected builders (`buildNamePromptConfig`, `buildJoinPromptConfig`, `buildDailyPromptConfig`) returning exact config; onSubmit closures fire the legacy side-effects in exact order. The unit-testable seam.

**Files:**
- Create: public/js/ui/name-prompts.js
- Modify: public/js/ui.js (barrel)
- Test: client-tests/name-prompts.test.js

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/name-prompts.test.js` pass; `npx jest` full suite green.

**Steps:** TDD — write name-prompts.test.js (config shapes + onSubmit side-effect order with mock deps + blank-name invalid(0) + join code uppercase + focusIndex by prefill + factory/builder daily-contract integration) → verify fail → implement the 3 pure builders (deps-injected, WHY comments) → add barrel export → verify pass → full suite → verify branch → commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/ui/name-prompts.js", "public/js/ui.js", "client-tests/name-prompts.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/name-prompts.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildNamePromptConfig shape (Join Game, Room <code>, 1 field maxLength24 gap1rem, no secondary, closeOnBackdrop false, focusDelayMs 100)", "buildJoinPromptConfig shape (Join a Room, no subtitle, 2 labelled fields, code maxLength6 uppercase gap1.5rem, secondary Back, closeOnBackdrop true, focusDelayMs 100, focusIndex by prefill)", "buildDailyPromptConfig shape (overlayClass daily-name-overlay, title+subtitle, daily-name-go/daily-name-cancel classNames, closeOnBackdrop true, focusDelayMs 0)", "name/join onSubmit order: setItem -> playerNameInput -> close -> (join: prepareAudio) -> showScreen lobby -> emit joinLobby{name,lobbyId,stableId} -> (name: history.replaceState)", "join uppercases code via trim().toUpperCase()", "daily onSubmit: trim -> close -> onConfirm(name) socket-free", "blank name -> invalid(0) + return, no side-effects, no close", "builders pure (deps/args only); barrel re-exports name-prompts.js", "WHY comments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Cutover — wire 3 wrappers + pixel-parity CSS, delete cssText
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the 3 prompt bodies with one-line factory calls + add .modal-*--prompt CSS reproducing legacy pixels exactly, shipped together (no broken intermediate). Zero visual/behaviour change; existing daily-name-prompt.test.js is the untouched contract guard.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/js/app.js:284-417 (showNamePrompt/showJoinPrompt -> thin glue + promptDeps; delete cssText)
- Modify: public/js/ui/ui-panels.js:429-517 (showDailyNamePrompt body -> factory; update comment to MI-02 done; delete cssText)
- Modify: public/css/04-modals.css (append .modal-*--prompt + .modal-prompt-* per the pixel-parity table)
- Guard (UNMODIFIED): client-tests/daily-name-prompt.test.js

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/daily-name-prompt.test.js` pass WITHOUT edits; `npx jest` full suite green. Pixel/behaviour eyeball user-side (jsdom no layout).

**Steps:** confirm guard green pre-refactor -> append parity CSS to 04-modals.css -> rewrite app.js showNamePrompt/showJoinPrompt as createPromptModal(buildXConfig({...,deps:promptDeps})) + import the 3 names from ./ui.js barrel (call sites unchanged) -> rewrite ui-panels.js showDailyNamePrompt as createPromptModal(buildDailyPromptConfig(...)) via direct ./modal.js + ./name-prompts.js imports + update WHY comment -> prove no legacy cssText remains -> guard + full suite green -> verify branch -> commit. Pure wiring cutover: no new failing test (behaviour was test-driven in Tasks 0-1; correctness = Task0/1 suites + unmodified guard staying green — validated refactor-under-existing-tests discipline).

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/js/app.js", "public/js/ui/ui-panels.js", "public/css/04-modals.css"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/daily-name-prompt.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["showNamePrompt/showJoinPrompt = thin glue over factory+builders with promptDeps from closure; all ~14 app.js cssText removed", "showDailyNamePrompt body = return createPromptModal(buildDailyPromptConfig({prefill,onConfirm})); exported signature + socket-free contract + daily-name-* class names byte-for-byte; ~10 cssText removed; comment updated to MI-02 done", "promptDeps wires socket/showScreen/getStableId/getPlayerNameInput/prepareAudio/getPathname/history/localStorage", ".modal-overlay--prompt/.modal-card--prompt/.modal-prompt-* reproduce legacy pixels exactly per the parity table; neutralise animation/padding/max-width/z-index/blur/box-shadow/position", "daily-name-prompt.test.js passes WITHOUT edits", "six <link> order unchanged; no server/socket/dep change; no dynamic .style.* migrated", "WHY comments"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Self-elim CSS hygiene (public/css/06-states-anim.css)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Delete orphaned .self-elim-could, style the unstyled 7.1 .self-elim-outs*/.self-elim-bridge classes, fix single-child .self-elim-grid timeout asymmetry — guarded by a DOM-contract test.

**Files:**
- Modify: public/css/06-states-anim.css (delete :1082-1093; append outs styling + .self-elim-col:only-child)
- Create: client-tests/self-elim-hygiene.test.js

**Verify:** `npx jest client-tests/self-elim-hygiene.test.js client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js client-tests/learning-breakdown.test.js` pass; `npx jest` full suite green. CSS pixel correctness user-side.

**Steps:** write self-elim-hygiene.test.js (no .self-elim-could emitted; .self-elim-outs*/-bridge emitted; timeout = single .self-elim-col) — characterization guard, passes on current code — -> delete orphan rule+comment :1082-1093 (siblings untouched) -> append outs styling (green #34d399/rgba(52,211,153) palette matching deleted .self-elim-could; no motion) + .self-elim-col:only-child{grid-column:1/-1} -> guard+siblings+full suite green -> verify branch -> commit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["public/css/06-states-anim.css", "client-tests/self-elim-hygiene.test.js"], "verifyCommand": "npx jest client-tests/self-elim-hygiene.test.js client-tests/self-elim-aftercare.test.js client-tests/learning-breakdown.test.js", "acceptanceCriteria": ["orphaned .self-elim-could + its comment (:1082-1093) deleted; no other rule touched", ".self-elim-outs/-label/-row/.self-elim-bridge styled consistent with the green self-elim palette; legible; no new motion (prefers-reduced-motion safe)", "single-child .self-elim-grid centered via .self-elim-col:only-child{grid-column:1/-1}; 2-col + @media 540px 1fr unchanged", "no JS change; self-elim-hygiene.test.js passes; self-elim-aftercare + learning-breakdown pass unmodified", "WHY comments"]}
```
